deploy.startCommand: /bin/sh -c "export NGINX_RESOLVER=$(awk '/^nameserver/ {ip=$2; if (ip ~ /:/) ip=\"[\"ip\"]\"; printf \"%s \", ip}' /etc/resolv.conf); envsubst '$API_UPSTREAM $NGINX_RESOLVER' < /etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf > /tmp/default.conf && mv /tmp/default.conf /etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf && nginx -g 'daemon off;'"
